original_prompt: Fix innerHTML undefined error during polling updates.
rephrased_goal: Resolve 'Cannot set properties of undefined (setting innerHTML)' by fixing missing onboards and implementing proper view lifecycle cleanup.

subtasks_required: Add available-hardware, hardware-pairs, hardware-list-display, and add-pair-btn to onboard call
tasks.testing_criteria: View loads without immediate crash on data fetch.
No innerHTML error on detail page.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Enhance controller.js with cleanup support
tasks.testing_criteria: Unsubs are executed when controller.destroy() is called.

subtasks_required: In src/main.js, keep track of currentView
Call currentView.destroy() before switching to new view
tasks.testing_criteria: Listeners from old views are stopped when navigating.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Use unsubs in all views
subtasks_required: Update all views to pass onSnapshot unsub results to view.unsub()
tasks.testing_criteria: No cross-contamination of polling between views.

subtasks_required: Check all innerHTML usages for guards
